name: NMIMS
full_name: Narsee Monjee Institute of Management Studies
about_content: NMIMS offers online degree programs for working professionals and fresh graduates.
why_choose_content: Known for management education, flexible online learning, and strong student support.
admission_steps: Register online, submit documents, pay the program fee, and wait for confirmation.
admission_fee_note: Admission fee may vary by program.
emi_content: EMI options are available on selected programs.
exam_content: Exams are conducted online as per university guidelines.
faculty_intro: Faculty includes experienced management and technology educators.
placement_content: Career services include resume support, interview preparation, and job portal access.
meta_description: Explore NMIMS online MBA, BBA, and other programs with fees and eligibility.

faqs.question: Is NMIMS UGC approved?
faqs.answer: Yes, NMIMS online programs listed on DegreeBaba are marked as UGC approved where applicable.

faqs.question: Does NMIMS offer EMI?
faqs.answer: Yes, EMI options are available on selected NMIMS programs.
